TITLE: LA SCOLARITÉ OBLIGATOIRE ET SA PROLONGATION
paragraph: The Conference 1) Notes that the issue of compulsory schooling and its extension presents itself in very different ways across various countries and that no comprehensive measure can currently be recommended.
